name: Infantry II
subtitle: Gen Synthesis
ability:
After this unit is destroyed, roll 1 die. If the result is 6-10, capture it. At the start of your turn, you may place captured infantry in your home system or in a space area with a war sun.

When you gain control of a planet, if you have more infantry on that planet than its resource value, gain that planet readied.

name: Letani Warrior II
subtitle: Arborec Infantry
ability:
After this unit is destroyed, roll 1 die. If the result is 6-10, capture it. At the start of your turn, you may place captured infantry on a planet you control with a structure or in a space area with a war sun or a flagship.

When you gain control of a planet, if you have more infantry on that planet than its resource value, gain that planet readied.

name: Spec Ops II
subtitle: Sol Infantry
ability:
After this unit is destroyed, roll 1 die. If the result is 5-10, capture it. At the start of your turn, you may place captured infantry in your home system or in a space area with a war sun or a flagship.

When you gain control of a planet, if you have more infantry on that planet than its resource or influence value, gain that planet readied.

name: Crimson Legionnaire II
subtitle: Mahact Infantry
ability:
After this unit is destroyed, capture it and gain 1 commodity or convert 1 of your commodities to a trade good. At the start of your turn, you may place captured infantry in your home system or in a space area with a war sun.

When you gain control of a planet, if you have more infantry on that planet than its resource value, gain that planet readied.

name: Space Dock II
subtitle: Enviro Compensator
ability:
This unit's PRODUCTION value is equal to 5 more than the resource value of this planet.

Up to 4 fighters in this system do not count against your ships' capacity.

During your turn, you may treat this space dock and this planet as if they were in your home system.

name: Floating Factory II
subtitle: Saar Space Dock
ability:
This unit is placed in a space area instead of on a planet. This unit can move and retreat as if it were a ship. If this unit is blockaded, it is destroyed.

During your turn, you may treat this space dock and your planets in this system as if they were in your home system.

name: Dimensional Tear II
subtitle: Vuil'raith Space Dock
ability:
This system is a gravity rift; your ships do not roll for this gravity rift. Place a dimensional tear token beneath this unit as a reminder.

Up to 13 fighters in this system do not count against your ships' capacity.

During your turn, you may treat this space dock and this planet as if they were in your home system.

name: Super Dreadnought II
subtitle: L1Z1X Dreadnought
ability:
This unit cannot be destroyed by "Direct Hit" action cards.

After an invasion in this system, if the number of planets you gained is equal to or greater than the number of your dreadnoughts in this system, you may spend 1 token from your strategy pool to ready 1 of your technologies.

name: Advanced Carrier II
subtitle: Sol Carrier
ability: Apply +1 to the movement of this unit when it moves through at least 2 different systems containing your command tokens.

name: Prototype War Sun II
subtitle: Muaat War Sun
ability:
Other players' units in this system lose PLANETARY SHIELD.

During an action, you may assign a hit to this unit to treat 1 system other than the Mecatol Rex system that contains your flagship as if it were a supernova for the duration of that action.

name: Moyin's Ashes
subtitle: Yin Mech
ability:
When you use INDOCTRINATION ability on this planet, you spend 1 less influence.

DEPLOY: When you use INDOCTRINATION ability, you may either spend 1 additional influence to instead replace 1 infantry with 1 mech, or spend 2 additional influence to instead replace 1 mech with 1 mech.

name: Moll Terminus
subtitle: Mentak Mech
ability: Other players' ground forces in this system cannot use SUSTAIN DAMAGE. After an invasion in which you destroy 1 or more structures on this planet, gain 2 trade goods.

name: Letani Behemoth
subtitle: Arborec Mech
ability: This unit cannot be produced by Space Docks. It is treated as both a structure and a ground force, but it cannot be treated as a structure for the purpose of scoring objectives. When this unit is on a planet, it cannot be transported.

name: Valkyrie Exoskeleton
subtitle: N'orr Mech
ability:
After space combat, if you have ships in this system, this unit does not count against your ships' capacity, but does after invasion.

After this unit uses SUSTAIN DAMAGE or is destroyed during Ground Combat, it produces 1 hit.

If you are the active player, apply +1 to combat rolls of 1 infantry in this system.

name: Ember Colossus
subtitle: Muaat Mech
ability: When you use your STAR FORGE faction ability or your flagship's ability in this system or an adjacent system, you may place 1 infantry from your reinforcements with this unit.

name: Reclaimer
subtitle: Winnu Mech
ability: After you resolve a tactical action during which you gained control of this planet, you may place 1 PDS or 1 space dock on this planet. If the planet is legendary or Mecatol Rex, you may instead place 1 infantry.

name: 4X41C "Helios" V2
subtitle: Bastion Space Dock
ability:
This unit's PRODUCTION value is equal to 5 more than the resource value of this planet.

The resource value of this planet is increased by 2. Up to 4 fighters in this system do not count against your ships' capacity.

During your turn, you may treat this space dock and this planet as if they were in your home system.

name: Trade Port II
subtitle: Celdauri Space Dock
ability:
This unit's PRODUCTION value is equal to 5 more than the resource or influence value of this planet.

Up to 4 fighters in this system do not count against your ships' capacity. This unit may use its ANTI-FIGHTER BARRAGE during each round of space combat. 

During your turn, you may treat this space dock and this planet as if they were in your home system.

name: Mycelium Ring II
subtitle: Myko-Mentori Space Dock
ability:
This unit’s PRODUCTION value is equal to 6 more than the resource value of this planet.

During your turn, you may treat this space dock and this planet as if they were in your home system.

DEPLOY: When you gain control of a planet, you may replace 3 infantry on that planet with 1 space dock.

name: Unholy Abomination II
subtitle: Cymiae Infantry
ability:
After this unit is destroyed, roll 1 die. If the result is 6-10, capture it. At the start of your turn, you may place captured infantry in your home system, on a planet you control or in a space area with a war sun.

When you gain control of a planet, if you have more infantry on that planet than its resource value, gain that planet readied.

name: Impactor II
subtitle: Zelian Infantry
ability:
After this unit is destroyed, roll 1 die. If the result is 6-10, capture it. At the start of your turn, you may place captured infantry in your home system, in an asteroid field system with your units or in a space area with a war sun.

When you gain control of a planet, if you have more infantry on that planet than its resource value, gain that planet readied.

name: Viper EX-23
subtitle: Firmament Mech
ability:
When ground forces are committed to this planet, you may choose for your units to coexist, if they were not already. Flip this card if your faction becomes the Obsidian.

DEPLOY: At the end of the status phase, you may place this unit into coexistence on a non-home planet controlled by another player who has no secret objectives scored.

name: Viper Hollow
subtitle: Decayed Mech
ability: If this unit was coexisting when this card flipped to this side, gain control of its planet and ready it; the other player's units are now coexisting.

name: Qanoj Shield Array
subtitle: Xxcha Monument
ability:
After 1 or more other players place their command token in this system, you may exhaust this card to gain 1 command token and place 1 PDS on a planet you control in this system.

When you exhaust this planet to cast votes, you may cast 2 additional votes for each of your PDS in this and adjacent systems.

name: The Blessed Sanctum
subtitle: Yin Monument
ability: ACTION: Exhaust this card to produce infantry on this planet up to its influence value, if able. Then, you may remove any number of infantry from this planet, gain 1 commodity for each unit removed.

name: Calm Seas Sanatorium
subtitle: Jol-Nar Monument
ability:
When a player gains technology that you own, you may allow them to move 1 of their infantry on the game board into coexistence onto this planet. They may use this planet's technology specialty without exhausting it.

When you exhaust this planet to cast votes, you may cast 2 additional votes for each coexisting unit on this planet and 1 additional vote for each system adjacent to this planet that contains no ships.

name: G'hom Firefly Beacon
subtitle: Norr Monument
ability:
Place this unit in the space area of any system containing your units that does not contain planets, instead of on a planet.

When this unit is on the game board, it is treated as both a planet and a structure on it. Only infantry can be produced on this planet. If this unit is blockaded or removed, destroy all units on the planet and discard all attached cards.

Resources: 0
Influence: 2
